title: Obamium
description: A small Mod About Obamium and Obama.
body:
Have you ever wanted Obama in Minecraft? Do you ever wanted Obamium to craft Tools better than Netherite?

No?
You can get it anyway.

This mod includes:
- A new Dimension called `Obamas Homeworld´
- Obamium which spawn in this Dimension.
- Obamium Tools
- Lavender Stone (Purple Stone)
- Obamium Trees and Wood
- Obama Sandwiches
- Obama and evil Obama 
- 
This Mod is just a Joke and Server Side Only!
Have Fun!
